evidence_quotes.quote: safeguards to impede companies to nullify purchases of games/programs you buy.
take your money AND your product from you, which happens digitally and its not fair.

paragraphs.text: Hello members of the council. Reading the Digital Fairness Act, I can see that it could include safeguards to impede companies to nullify purchases of games/programs you buy. As for now, companies reserve the right to take your money AND your product from you, which happens digitally and its not fair. The Stop Killing Games initiative raised more than 1.4 MILLION signatures so we can talk about this subject (https://eci.ec.europa.eu/045/public/#/screen/home) (https://www.stopkillinggames.com) I highly recommend checking it out. Can we open discussions about that please?
